prose: The frontier-orbital calculation on aniline was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory. The calculation was carried out in the gas phase (with no solvent) using PySCF, with density fitting enabled (resolution-of-identity approximation) to speed up the SCF. The geometry was supplied from the molecule file located at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz, and no additional geometry optimization was performed within this calculation. The charge was set to neutral (charge 0) and the spin multiplicity to singlet (multiplicity 1). The SCF converged within 9 cycles, resulting in a HOMO energy of -5.5538 eV, a LUMO energy of -0.2490 eV, and a HOMO–LUMO gap of 5.3048 eV, computed as a Koopmans-style orbital difference. The calculation was completed successfully with no warnings raised, and all integrity checks passed with the result deemed trustworthy.
